_comment: Biome registry for procedural map generation. Each biome carries a center in climate space and a weighted tile distribution; the map generator samples a climate vector per cell and blends biomes by inverse-square distance from the cell's climate point to each biome's center, summing tile weights into one combined distribution and picking a tile from it. Tile aspects (food, wood, height, …) on the resolved CardDefinitions drive downstream game behavior — biomes only choose which definition_id goes where.

_rules.tile_keys: must be a card key inside card_type 'tile' / category 'default'
_rules.tile_weights: positive integers; relative within a biome
_rules.category_note: biomes are category-agnostic — the zone's category byte selects the visual variant (e.g. 'sunny' vs 'winter') and tile data must mirror the same key→definition_id mapping across categories for that swap to land cleanly
